title: HTML Email Signature doesn't look good :(
excerpt: I’ve created a HTML Email Signature which looks great in a HTML viewer and in the signature viewer in Monday.com However, when I send an email it doesn’t look good.  Can anyone help or suggest how I can fix this ? Thanks…

posts.author: antonygarnett (Antony)
posts.cookedHtml: I’ve created a HTML Email Signature which looks great in a HTML viewer and in the signature viewer in Monday.com However, when I send an email it doesn’t look good. Can anyone help or suggest how I can fix this ? Thanks, Antony

posts.author: bluejays22 (Andrea)
posts.cookedHtml: Having the same issue. Did you figure it out?
